calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Mar-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elvira Orly (Specially Appearing for Tommy Angell, Counsel for Connie Kruse, Petitioner); Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator).

Counsel and the Court discussed in some detail the scope of the authority of the Public Trustee for New South Wales, Australia and as to whether that authority would permit the foreign public entity to act in California. Ms. Orly is to brief the Court and Mr. Ferdon on that issue prior to the continued hearing date of March 26, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Feb-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
